home_meta_title: docolin, structured knowledge for everything, built for humans and AI
home_meta_description: Open, community-verified documentation platform with attribution baked into every AI citation. Pre-alpha, AGPL, free forever. Launching with Linux help for newcomers.
home_hero_subtitle: Every guide on docolin carries a signed stamp showing it worked, on a real system, on a real date. The open commons for technical knowledge, read by humans and AI.
home_what_title: Open, verified, and credited, by construction.
home_what_structured_body: Every guide lives under a kind path. The same link resolves differently depending on your setup, hardware, and version.
home_what_verified_body: A guide's Pango Score is a signed record that it worked, on real systems and versions, by humans and agents. Proof, not just popularity.
home_what_attributed_body: Your work stays credited even when an AI surfaces it. Contributor attribution baked into every citation, human or machine.
home_what_attributed_question: How do I install NVIDIA drivers on Ubuntu 24.04?
home_what_attributed_answer: On Ubuntu 24.04 with an RTX-series GPU, the recommended driver is the proprietary 550 series. Run sudo ubuntu-drivers install...
home_search_title: Ask once. Get the right answer for your setup.
home_search_body: Same docolin link. The result resolves to the guide that applies to your distro, hardware, and version. Verified by readers on similar systems.
home_search_right_title: AMDGPU on Fedora, out of the box
home_personas_title: Everyone who creates or relies on knowledge.
home_personas_readers_body: Find answers that match your setup. Verified by people running what you're running. No more 2019 blog posts dressed up as 2026 advice.
home_personas_contributors_body: Write once, get cited forever. Attribution travels with your work, even when AI tools surface it. The feedback loop that motivated good writing, restored.
home_personas_projects_body: Connect your repo on docolin. Auto-sync on push. Keep editorial control through branch locking. Community contributions, version history, search, and MCP grounding come for free.
home_personas_ai_body: One grounding surface that resolves across every source to the reader's exact setup, with the same verification standard everywhere. Every result an agent serves carries author attribution by construction.
home_personas_readers_mock_title: Install proprietary NVIDIA drivers on Ubuntu 24.04
home_personas_readers_mock_snippet: On Ubuntu 24.04 the recommended driver for RTX-series cards is the proprietary 550 series. The simplest path is...
home_personas_contributors_mock_citation: cited 47 times by AI assistants this week
home_why_title: The knowledge layer the web forgot to build for the AI era.
home_why_stat1_body: The question-asking surface has collapsed as AI tools answer first, down from more than 200,000 questions a month at the 2014 peak. Documentation is still the number-one way developers learn; they just reach it through AI now, where accuracy and attribution aren't guaranteed.
home_why_stat2_body: Most maintainers writing the knowledge are unpaid. Their work gets scraped by AI without credit. The feedback loop that motivated good writing has been quietly eaten by training pipelines.
home_why_stat3_label: what docolin costs to use, forever
home_why_stat3_body: Structured for AI grounding, verifiable for human trust. AGPL-licensed and free for everyone, forever. The intended funding model is sponsorship from infrastructure companies whose tooling benefits from being part of the substrate.
home_status_body: Scaffolding the platform now, in public, under AGPL. Code, design decisions, and roadmap are all visible. Follow along, file issues, or write the first guides.
error_404_body: Sadly, not what you were looking for. This path doesn't exist yet. docolin is pre-alpha, so plenty of routes from the nav are still placeholders.
error_404_pangolin_alt: The docolin pangolin, sitting and waiting
error_5xx_body: An error happened while loading this page. Try refreshing, or head back home. If it keeps happening, file an issue on GitHub.
error_generic_body: We couldn't load this page. Head back home or try again.
onboarding_subtitle: Your handle is how everyone (and every AI) finds your work. You can't change it later. Support can adjust it in rare cases.
onboarding_handle_hint_idle: Lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes. 3 to 30 characters.
onboarding_handle_status_invalid_format: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and single dashes. Can't start or end with a dash.
onboarding_handle_status_v_numeric: Looks like a version number. Pick something else.
onboarding_handle_status_reserved_taxono: Reserved by the kinds taxonomy. Pick another.
onboarding_handle_status_reserved_system: Reserved by the platform. Pick another.
onboarding_handle_status_reserved_preres: Reserved for a real-world entity. If you represent it, you can request a separate org later. For your personal handle, pick another.
onboarding_handle_status_matches_prefix: Starts with a reserved prefix. Pick another.
onboarding_handle_status_matches_suffix: Ends with a reserved suffix. Pick another.
onboarding_displayname_hint: Optional. Shown next to your handle on contributions.
onboarding_error_not_authenticated: Your sign-in session expired. Please sign in again.
onboarding_error_provision_failed: Couldn't create your account. Please try again.
dashboard_load_error: Couldn't load this page. Please refresh and try again.
dashboard_welcome_strip_title: Everything you publish lives in an org.
dashboard_welcome_strip_body: Your personal org is ready. Open it to add your first project.
dashboard_org_projects_empty_body: Projects organize your docos and connect to a source. Git-backed projects sync from a repo; native projects let you write directly on docolin.
dashboard_new_org_card_body: Spin up a separate namespace for a brand, team, or project.
inbox_done_empty_body: Mark notifications done to file them here.
admin_claims_search_placeholder: Search by id, slug, or handle
admin_claim_verify_hint: Verify this domain owns the brand for the slug above.
admin_claim_siblings_warning_one: Approving this claim will cancel 1 other pending claim for the same slug.
admin_claim_siblings_warning_many: Approving this claim will cancel {count} other pending claims for the same slug.
admin_claim_approve_body: Creates the org and assigns the requester as admin. Any sibling pending claims for the same slug are cancelled.
admin_claim_approve_notes_hint: Stored on the claim record for audit.
admin_claim_cancel_body: Marks the claim cancelled and notifies the user in their inbox with your reason.
admin_claim_error_already_resolved: This claim has already been resolved.
admin_claim_error_slug_taken: An org already exists with this slug.
admin_claim_error_provision_failed: Failed to create the org. Try again.
admin_claim_error_notes_required: A reason is required when cancelling.
dashboard_pangolin_alt: The docolin pangolin, sitting and waiting
dashboard_project_docos_empty_body_git: This project polls your repo daily by default. Once we've pulled it, your docs show up here.
dashboard_project_docos_empty_webhook_te: Want instant updates when you push? Webhook setup coming soon.
dashboard_project_docos_empty_body_nativ: The native editor is coming soon. You'll create and edit docs directly from here.
dashboard_project_docos_empty_body_synce: Sync finished but no eligible Markdown files were found under the configured subpath.
Every eligible file has a problem (see above). Fix them and they'll appear here on the next sync.
doco_pango_score_be_first: Be the first to verify this on your setup
doco_stamp_question: Did this work on your setup?
doco_stamp_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
doco_stamp_signin_nudge: Sign in so your verification counts for more.
doco_deleted_body: The source file for this doco was removed from the upstream repository. The content below reflects the last published version.
doco_discussions_cta_body: Ask questions, share fixes, or talk through edge cases with other readers.
discussion_list_empty_body: Start the first one. Ask a question, flag something out of date, or share a fix.
discussion_list_empty_open_body: Nothing open right now. Start one?
discussion_list_empty_closed_body: Closed and resolved discussions show up here.
discussion_compose_signin: Sign in to start a discussion
discussion_new_subtitle: Ask a question, flag something out of date, or share a fix.
discussion_reply_placeholder: Write a reply. Markdown is supported.
discussion_reply_empty: No replies yet. Be the first to respond.
discussion_error_forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
dashboard_new_project_title_git: Sync a project from a GitHub repo.
dashboard_new_project_subtitle: Your project slug becomes part of every doc URL. You can't change it later. Support can adjust it in rare cases.
dashboard_new_project_repo_hint: Public GitHub repos only for now.
dashboard_new_project_switch_to_native: Or start a project from scratch (no repo needed)
dashboard_new_project_switch_to_git: Or import from a GitHub repo instead
dashboard_new_project_native_banner_body: You'll write docs directly in docolin. No external repo needed.
dashboard_new_project_slug_status_invali: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and single dashes. Can't start or end with a dash.
dashboard_new_project_slug_status_reserv: Reserved by the platform. Pick another.
dashboard_new_project_slug_status_taken: Already used in this org. Pick another.
dashboard_new_project_displayname_hint: Shown as the project's friendly title. Falls back to the slug if blank.
dashboard_new_project_subpath_hint: Where docs live in the repo, e.g. docs/. Leave blank to sync from the repo root.
dashboard_new_project_error_invalid_url: That doesn't look like a GitHub repo URL.
dashboard_new_project_error_repo_not_fou: We couldn't find that repo. Check it's public and the URL is correct.
dashboard_new_project_error_rate_limited: GitHub rate-limited us. Try again in a moment.
dashboard_new_project_error_private: Private repos aren't supported yet. Make it public or pick a different one.
dashboard_new_project_error_network: Couldn't reach GitHub. Check your connection and try again.
dashboard_new_project_error_provision_fa: Couldn't create the project. Try again.
dashboard_new_org_title: Pick a slug for your new org.
dashboard_new_org_subtitle: Your org's slug becomes part of every URL on docolin. You can't change it later. Support can adjust it in rare cases.
dashboard_new_org_claim_explainer_body: If you represent this brand, you can file a verification claim. We'll match your support email's domain to the requested slug. Your account stays usable on your personal org while we review.
dashboard_new_org_claim_details_hint: Anything that helps verification (your role, the company, supporting links).
dashboard_new_org_claim_filed_body: Send us a verification email from the domain you're claiming. Until we receive it from a matching address, your claim sits idle and we can't review it.
dashboard_new_org_claim_filed_mail_fallb: Or email support@docolin.com manually, quoting the reference id above.
dashboard_new_org_claim_filed_mail_body:
Hi docolin team,

I'd like to claim the slug "{slug}" on docolin.

My reference id is {uid}. This email is from an address at the domain that owns the {slug} brand, so please match the domain and approve.

Quick context (who you are, your role, anything that helps us verify):

{context}

Thanks!
{name}
dashboard_new_org_error_provision_failed: Couldn't create the org. Please try again.
dashboard_new_org_error_claim_failed: Couldn't file the claim. Please try again.
dashboard_new_org_handle_hint_idle: Lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes. 3 to 30 characters.
dashboard_project_sync_errors_subtext: These files weren't published because they have problems. Fix in your repo and they'll appear on the next sync.
dashboard_project_sync_error_code_yaml_p: The YAML frontmatter at the top of the file is malformed.
dashboard_project_sync_error_code_frontm: Frontmatter is missing required fields or has invalid values.
dashboard_project_sync_error_code_handle: One or more author handles don't exist on docolin.
dashboard_project_sync_error_code_asset_: An image is too large to archive.
Couldn't upload an image to docolin storage.
moderation_report_description: Tell us what's wrong. We never share who reported content.
moderation_report_details_placeholder: Add any context that helps us review this.
moderation_report_success_body: Our team will review it and act if needed.
moderation_report_error_details: Add a few details for an "Other" report.
moderation_report_error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
moderation_request_deletion_description: This hides the content immediately and sends it to platform staff for review.
moderation_delete_description: It will be hidden right away. Platform staff review deletions, and you'll be notified of the outcome.
admin_moderation_redact_help: Edit out the offending content and keep the rest. The original is destroyed; this redacted version stays visible.
admin_moderation_version_hint: Doco version takedown isn't wired up yet. Dismiss, or note for follow-up.
admin_home_moderation_desc: Open reports and pending deletion requests.
